# Concepts — Index

Single-topic folder for the reference-vault fixture. It gathers one concept, one
entity, and one topic page, all grounded in [[Provenance Primer]].

## Pages

- [[Provenance]] — the concept page; what provenance is and why it matters.
- [[Sample Tool]] — the entity page; a fixture tool that records provenance.
- [[Reference Topic]] — the topic page; a curated landing page for this folder.

## Subtopics

None.
